{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Tomb Hydra's binding
| introduced = cradle-10-reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|The [[Tomb Hydra's binding]] is shaped like a human heart the size of a head and glows with death [[madra]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c13">''Reaper'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
